overview: Hightower Men's Clinic specializes in treating erectile dysfunction using Pulse Wave Therapy, a noninvasive acoustic wave treatment that restores blood flow to the penis. The clinic operates three Kentucky locations and offers free assessments.
highlights: Pulse Wave Therapy (FDA-approved for soft tissue repair and improved circulation)
Noninvasive, drug-free treatment requiring no needles
targetAudience: Men seeking treatment for erectile dysfunction.
